title: B.Sc in Biochemistry
content: XII with Science with minimum 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons) Biochemistry Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 To build a strong foundation in the fundamental principles of biochemistry, molecular biology, genetics, and allied life sciences. 02 To develop laboratory and analytical skills through hands-on training in key biochemical techniques such as spectrophotometry, chromatography, and electrophoresis, along with modern biochemical techniques, instrumentation and thorough understanding of laboratory safety and data handling. 03 To enhance critical thinking and problem-solving abilities for understanding complex biochemical processes and their applications. 04 To cultivate scientific temper and research aptitude through project work, seminars, and exposure to recent advancements in biochemistry. 05 To inculcate professional values and ethical practices in biological research and biotechnology applications. 06 To prepare students for diverse career opportunities in academia, research laboratories, pharmaceutical, healthcare, food, and biotechnology industries. 07 To motivate graduates to pursue higher education (M.Sc./M.Tech./Ph.D.) and competitive examinations in life sciences and related fields. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the concepts of biochemistry through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biochemical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates of biochemistry will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge and Problem Analysing: The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the concepts of biochemistry through application-based learning and to apply the knowledge in analyzing the problems related to various fields of life sciences for their solutions and enhances overall development and also equip with advanced biochemical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude with problem solving skills. 02 Formulation and Design: The graduates will be trained to handle the advanced techniques of biochemistry to formulate the solutions of variety of problems related to the real life and will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing and continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organizations. XII with Science with minimum 50% marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons) Biochemistry Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
